company.headline2: You Found Out After Hiring Them.
company.sub: 55% of professionals admit to exaggerating their resume. Traditional interviews predict job success only 57% of the time — barely better than a coin flip. HireProof lets you evaluate real work before you commit.

professional.sub: Stop paying mentors who teach you to fake experience. Go directly to real employers — work on their actual product, build real proof, and let verified outcomes speak louder than any resume.

points.title: Memory-safe by design
points.desc: Built with Rust — no buffer overflows, no data leaks.

points.title: Always on
points.desc: Engineered for reliability. Your data is safe and always accessible.

shared.a: HireProof is a two-sided marketplace where professionals invest in real, mentored work engagements with companies. Companies get to evaluate real work before hiring. Professionals build verified proof of their abilities.

shared.q: Is HireProof only for software developers?
shared.a: No. While we started with tech, HireProof is for any professional — designers, salespeople, analysts, marketers, and more. Anyone who can demonstrate skills through structured work engagements.

Payment direction is flexible. In most engagements, the professional pays the company for the opportunity — think of it like tuition going directly to the source, not a middleman bootcamp. Some companies also offer paid positions. Each listing specifies the terms.

company.q: How much time does mentoring require?
company.a: Most engagements require 5-10 hours per week of mentoring time per professional. You define the scope and pace.

company.q: What if the professional doesn't deliver?
company.a: You set outcome criteria upfront. If they're not met, you provide an honest review. There's no obligation to hire. Every engagement is a trial.

professional.q: Why would I pay a company instead of them paying me?
professional.a: Think of it as investing in yourself — directly. Instead of paying $15K to a bootcamp that gives you toy projects, you invest a fraction of that to work on a real product, with a real mentor, and walk away with verified proof and potential job offers.

professional.q: What if I already have experience?
professional.a: HireProof works as a regular hiring platform too. Companies can post paid positions, and you can apply directly. Your verified track record makes you stand out.

company.title: Stop Gambling on Resumes
company.sub: See what professionals can actually do before you hire them.

professional.title: Stop Faking It. Start Proving It.
professional.sub: Real experience with real companies. Verified outcomes that open doors.
